step_rationale: Anti-inflammatory lipid mediator; decreased in plaque rupture reflects loss of endothelial/inflammatory control.
mechanism: Annexin A1 downregulation after plaque rupture indicates disruption of local anti-inflammatory signaling and heightened plaque destabilization.

references.title: Single-Nucleus Transcriptomic Atlas of Human Pericoronary Epicardial Adipose Tissue in Normal and Pathological Conditions.
The human HDL proteome displays high inter-individual variability and is altered dynamically in response to angioplasty-induced atheroma plaque rupture.
Atorvastatin modifies the protein profile of circulating human monocytes after an acute coronary syndrome.
